chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-396 of 2023 (Ghulam Rasool Lakho Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 26-01-2024. Mr. Achar Khan Gabole, advocate for the applicant. None for the private respondents. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C has impugned order dated 24-05-2023 passed by learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze, whereby his application for issuance of direction against the police to record his FIR was dismissed. Apparently, some of the injuries sustained by the injured are cognizable in nature. The registration of an FIR for a cognizable offence could not be prevented under any circumstance. In these premises, the impugned order is set aside with direction to SHO concerned to record the statement of the applicant for purpose of FIR. The instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
